title: Degraded service
body:
Resolved

  • We identified the reason for the high memory usage and applied a fix.
  • app.qfield.cloud is running again without issues.

Investigating

  • Update 2026-05-05: We are experiencing a service disruption on app.qfield.cloud. We are investigating the cause of the issue and will provide further updates as soon as possible.
  • Update 2026-05-05: We are seeing unsually high memory usage and we are still investigating the root cause of it.
